$comment: c63 (D-CSUBSET-VA-LIST-PARAM-SLOT): a `va_list ap` PARAMETER consumed by va_arg (the vprintf / sqlite3_str_vappendf shape) needs a storage slot — va_arg reads + ADVANCES the list (lvalue use). A va_list param was a pure-SSA Arg with no slot -> error[H0009]. FIX (per-strategy, config-driven): SysV registers the incoming caller-tag pointer as ap's address (forwarding, no copy); Win64/Apple slot-back the char* (driven address-taken by va_arg usage); AAPCS64 struct already worked. VALUE-CORRECT + SENSITIVE: sumv va_start's then FORWARDS its va_list to vsum; 10+11+12+9 = 42 (a broken forward would not give 42). RED-ON-DISABLE: revert -> H0009. Pure c-subset -> all 4 targets; pe RUNS on Windows, elf/arm64 RUN on linux/qemu (exercising SysV + AAPCS64 + Win64 va_list ABIs).
